text: A Data Lake is a centralized repository storing raw data in native format (Parquet, Avro, JSON) on cheap object storage (S3, ADLS). Schema-on-read: apply schema when querying, not when storing. Used for big data analytics, ML training, and data science. The Lakehouse architecture (Databricks, 2021) adds ACID transactions and data warehouse features
Lakehouse (Delta Lake, Iceberg, Hudi): ACID transactions on Parquet files in S3 — combine data lake flexibility with warehouse reliability.
